title: padus virginiana var. xanthocarpa
intro: Padus virginiana var. xanthocarpa, also known as the yellow-fruited dogwood, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Padus virginiana var. xanthocarpa include its potential to reduce blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
